name: Pecan Praline Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the graham cracker crumbs, granulated sugar, and salt.
2. Add the melted butter to the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
3. Press the mixture into the bottom and up the sides of an ungreased springform pan.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. In a separate bowl, mix together the cream cheese, granulated sugar, salt, eggs, and vanilla extract until smooth.
6. Stir in the toasted ground pecans and praline liqueur.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 1 hour or until set.
9. Allow to cool completely before serving.
10. Garnish with additional toasted pecan halves if desired.
